title: Grow Lettuce Hydroponically
description: Plant lettuce seeds and harvest fresh leaves using your hydroponic setup.

dialogue.text: Nice work with the basil! Ready for another crop? Lettuce is easy to grow and perfect for salads.

options.text: Sounds tasty! How do I start?

dialogue.text: Place lettuce seeds in damp starter plugs. Keep them under light for about a week until they sprout.
Transfer the plugs to your tub and let them grow for a few weeks. Harvest outer leaves as needed for fresh salads!
